judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but with significant losses, high debt, and negative cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 16.3%; next earnings date is 2026-05-07.
positives: Revenue growth 111.6% YoY indicates strong market adoption.
Gross margin 69.4% suggests efficient service delivery before operating expenses.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a high mean target of $138.90.
Total cash of $2.27B provides some liquidity.
negatives: Operating margin -6.9% and profit margin -25.6% show the business is not yet profitable.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $-8.56B indicates a substantial cash burn.
Debt/Equity ratio of 738.54 is extremely high, indicating significant financial leverage.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year are sharply negative.

news.paragraph: CoreWeave is reportedly building its enterprise business, particularly within financial services, while AI compute costs are highlighted as a significant factor in content creation. Hedge funds are also reportedly looking at AI supply chains and Gen Z spending. The company's focus on enterprise solutions and the broader trend of AI integration suggest potential for continued demand. Traders should monitor the competitive landscape and the company's ability to manage its substantial AI infrastructure costs.

headlines.title: AI supply chain, Gen Z spending among hedge fund picks at Sohn Hong Kong
This Cannes Film Cost $500,000 to Make. $400,000 Was AI Compute Costs.
CoreWeave Building Up Enterprise Business, Led By Financial Services
